text: Photo by Ice Cube on April 18, 2026. May be an image of harmonica, microphone, concert and text.

Memphis, I’m pulling up to the RiverBeat Festival on May 2nd.

If they don’t love you. I do. Don’t meet me there. Beat me there. 

icecube.com/tour (link in bio)
Back at it. Catch me LIVE in a city near you—icecube.com/tour (link in bio).
Rockin’ the mic is my first love. It never gets old. Be in the house when I touchdown in your town—icecube.com/tour (link in bio).

‼️420 on the Rocks just got even bigger 🧊🧊 Ice Cube. Snoop Dogg. FULL SETS. Too Short. Czarface (ft. Inspectah Deck of Wu-Tang, 7L & Esoteric). One for the books. All tickets previously purchased via AXS will be honored, *extremely* limited amount of tickets remaining. 

Presale happening today, Thursday, April 2 at 10am MTN – Friday, April 3 at 9am MTN with code CUBESNOOP before general on sale Friday, April 3 at 10am MT.
If you haven’t played this in a minute, today’s a good day to fix that. Run it back and stream it with your favorite songs from that Man Down record.
‘Bout ready to get it crackin’ for the first show of 2026 next month. Ft. Lauderdale, catch me April 10th at Tortuga Music Festival. You already know how we do. Go to icecube.com/tour for tickets.

Four new shows just got added for 2026. If any of these locations is near a city you rep, you already know what time it is.

➡️June 19 - Mescalero at Inn of the Mountain Gods Resort & Casino 
➡️June 26 - Orillia at Casino Rama Resort
➡️September 18 - Airway Heights at Northern Quest Amphitheater
➡️October 3 - West Springfield at The Big E Arena

Tickets drop this Friday, March 13 at 10AM local. Stay tuned, more dates still on the way.

This June…
Season 9 - The 9th Wonder in the Summer touches down. Coming to a city near you. On @cbssports all summer

I got Alabama and Mississippi lined up in 2026. I’m comin’ to ya backyard on April 30 in Tuscaloosa with the homie Killer Mike at Mercedes-Benz Amphitheater. On May 3 in Gautier at The Sound Amphitheater. Tickets drop Friday, March 6 at 10AM local, check the link in bio and gaffle up them tickets.
Fort Lauderdale, We on deck April 10 at Tortuga Music Festival. Come hang out with your homie, Ice Cube—icecube.com/tour (Link in bio).
